name: Behalf.bot — WhatsApp
description: Read-only WhatsApp group monitoring with groups-only allowlist + DM hard-block. Hook-layer enforced.

allowlist_path.description: Absolute path to the groups allowlist JSON file. Defaults to plugins/whatsapp/data/whatsapp-allowlist.json under CHASSIS_HOME.

_chassis_v1_notes.shell_implementation: Plugin ships shell scripts only (no JS/TS SDK in chassis V1). The 'register' semantics map: contracts.tools → installer can invoke plugins/whatsapp/scripts/wacli-safe.sh; contracts.hooks → installer's bootstrap exports CHASSIS_WHATSAPP_SAFE so the chassis-core guardrails activate the wacli DM block.
_chassis_v1_notes.compat_bundle: See .claude-plugin/plugin.json for the Claude Code compatibility shim.
